reference_postmortem: At T+00:01, Kafka consumers across order-worker and notification-service began falling behind due to a network partition between the Kafka broker and application pods. Consumer lag spiked to >5000 messages within 2 minutes. The root cause was a Chaos Mesh network partition experiment targeting the Kafka broker. Mitigation: delete the Chaos Mesh experiment. Follow-up: implement Kafka consumer lag alerting thresholds, add multi-broker redundancy, and test consumer reconnection resilience.
